chunks.title: David Enters Saul's Camp
chunks.reason: Describes the Ziphites' report, Saul's pursuit, and David entering the camp with Abishai.

chunks.title: David Spares Saul
chunks.reason: Records the exchange between Abishai and David regarding striking Saul, followed by their action of taking the spear and jug.

chunks.title: David Confronts Abner and Saul
chunks.reason: Contains David calling out to the camp, his rebuke of Abner, and his direct address to Saul explaining his actions.

chunks.title: Saul's Repentance and Blessing
chunks.reason: Covers Saul's confession of sin, David's final words about God's repayment, and the mutual blessing concluding the encounter.
